description: This file defines a Spring Boot REST controller named HelloController with endpoints for welcoming users, redirecting to API documentation, health check, and application info.

classes.name: HelloController
classes.description: Spring Boot REST controller providing basic endpoints for health checks, documentation redirect, and informational responses.

methods.name: hello
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/' and returns a welcome message.

methods.name: docs
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/docs' and redirects to Swagger UI, preserving request scheme, host, and port.

methods.name: health
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/health' and returns application health status.

methods.name: info
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/api/info' and returns application information.
